service.provider: City of Buckeye Development Services Department

notes: This configuration resolves City of Buckeye zoning by intersecting runtime coordinates with Layer 0 of the City's official public Zoning feature service.
The ArcGIS item is owned by CityofBuckeye, is publicly accessible, and is designated public authoritative by ArcGIS Online.
ZoningDistrictCode is the published base zoning code and ZoningDistrict is the corresponding published district name; no locally guessed code translation is required.
The configured test coordinate at Buckeye City Hall resolves to CC, Commercial Center, with ordinance 6-96.

ZoningPK, OrdinanceNumber, TrackingNumber, CaseNumber, ApprovalDate, HistoricZoning, Notes, EditedDate, and Acres are retained when published because they may provide relevant zoning history and source context.
The service description states that the data originated with the Maricopa County Assessor's Office and was modified by the City of Buckeye to fit the City's zoning schema and districts.
HistoricZoning is contextual and must not replace the current base zoning code.

A resolved zoning result supports permit research but does not replace review of applicable zoning cases, ordinances, planned-development documents, stipulations, overlays, or confirmation by the City of Buckeye.
